# Indian Potato (indianpotato.in)

## About
Indian Potato (इंडियन पोटैटो) is India's #1 Hindi-language potato industry platform. We serve farmers, traders, cold storage operators, processors, and exporters with market data, news, government schemes, variety information, and a business directory.

## Key Content
- Live Mandi Prices: Daily wholesale potato prices from major Indian mandis (APMCs) — /mandi
- Industry News: Latest updates on potato production, exports, government policies — /samachar
- Potato Varieties: Database of major Indian potato varieties with specifications — /kisme
- Government Schemes: Active subsidies and programs for potato farmers — /yojnaye
- Business Directory: Companies in processing, cold storage, seeds, equipment, exports — /directory

## Data
- India potato production: 60.18 million tonnes (2024-25), world's #2 producer after China
- Potato flakes export: ₹527 crore in FY25 (450% growth in 3 years)
- Platform serves 15,000+ weekly readers

## Contact
- Website: https://www.indianpotato.in
- Email: info@indpotato.com

## Owner
Indpotato Pvt Ltd, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Pune, Maharashtra, India
